programme.title: Gilberto Gil
programme.desc: Brazilian artist Gilberto Gil returns to Jazz à Vienne in France with a new round of singing that is inspired by his latest album ‘Fé na Festa': a mixture of celebration, tradition and even some rock now and then. Gilberto Gil, worldwide known for as musician and the Brazilian minister of Culture, was one of the pioneers of the cultural movement ‘tropicalismo'. This movement, with a strong character of social protest, combines elements of traditional Brazilian culture with modern art forms. Gilberto Gil's new sound clearly has its roots in Brazilian culture, yet it is always inspired by jazz.

programme.title: Art Blakey
programme.desc: An extraordinary collection of clips in all jazz genres from the most beautiful concerts and the most special festivals, performed by the finest jazz musicians.

programme.title: Jimmy Witherspoon & Rozaa Wortham
programme.desc: Since 1977, Estival is a summer jazz festival in Switzerland, Lugano. Estival offers a thrilling and particularly surprising line-up that explores the rich world of contemporary music whilst promoting the understanding of different cultures, tolerance, and co-existence. Jimmy Witherspoon and Rozaa Wortham, two incredible brilliant jazz musicians. Rozaa Wortham starts off the show with the Jimmy Witherspoon Quartet. Swinging and full of energy she performs ‘It Don't Mean A Thing'. Jimmy Witherspoon, known for the song “Ain't Nobody's Business” ends the show with some astounding lean-back blues.

programme.title: Kenny Barron
programme.desc: Pianist Kenny Barron's June 27, 2019 appearance at the Alfa Jazz Festival in Ukraine's Lviv was a celebration of sublime jazz virtuosity. The revered elder statesmen of jazz piano brought his regular working trio of Kiyoshi Kitagawa (bass) and Jonathan Blake (drums), augmented by stellar jazzman Marcus Strickland (tenor saxophone) and young lion Riley Mulherkar (trumpet). Their seamless blend of classic bebop and modern explorations spoke of a deep, emotive connection to each note, captivating the Ukrainian audience with lyrical improvisations during this unforgettable concert.

programme.title: Curtis Stigers
programme.sub-title: Curtis Stigers - Fly Me To The Moon
programme.desc: The Danish Radio Big Band joins forces with American vocalist Curtis Stigers to celebrate Frank Sinatra's iconic concerts at The Sands Hotel in Las Vegas. Curtis Stigers and the big band present the most popular evergreens from the American songbook of the 1950s and 1960s, one of which is the classic that lend the concert its name: “Fly Me To The Moon”.

programme.title: Jazzmeia Horn
programme.desc: Vocalist Jazzmeia Horn's 2019 Malta Jazz Festival appearance was a celebration of jazz's future, infused with the soul of its past. Featuring Keith Brown (piano), Rashaan Carter (bass), Irwin Hall (flute and saxophone), and Anwar Marshall (drums), the young singer's performance was a reminder of jazz's enduring power to speak to the heart. Situated at the Valletta waterfront outside Our Lady of Liesse Church, Horn's concert was a truly spellbinding experience.

programme.title: David Linx
programme.desc: This might come unexpected, but the Brussels Jazz Orchestra (BJO) is not the kind of jazz orchestra that sticks to standards. They prefer to achieve the highest level by composing original music, creating unique arrangements, and playing inventively as well as passionately. In fact, it really is jazz with a dynamic orchestral sound, with a classic strength in which each musician is also a brilliant soloist. Call it an ‘orchestrated passion for jazz' that incites BJO to create world-class music. Founded in 1993 by Frank Vaganée, Serge Plume and Marc Godfroid, the Brussels Jazz Orchestra is recognised and has been subsidised by the Flemish Government since. Brussels Jazz Orchestra is orchestra in residence at Flagey in Brussels. During this project the BJO performs with David Linx. The Belgian jazz singer will resort to any idiom, any language, any time signature. Occasionally he seems to dispense with bar lines altogether, or he will go beyond lyrics, as he abandons his own words for some free-wheeling scat.

programme.title: Modern Jazz Quartet
programme.desc: Formed in 1952 from the rhythm section of Dizzy Gillespie's big band, the Modern Jazz Quartet took its inspiration from classical chamber music as well as jazz's blues roots. The group enjoyed a decades-long career with multiple critically acclaimed albums, cementing their place in the history of the genre. Following concerts in Rotterdam and Amsterdam the days before, the Modern Jazz Quartet performed at Singer Concertzaal in Laren for Dutch TV on March 31, 1969. Composed of Milt Jackson on vibraphone, John Lewis on piano, Percy Heath on bass, and Connie Kay on drums, the foursome plays with elegance and style.

programme.title: Evgeny Kissin, Nikolai Demidenko, Warsaw Philharmonic Orchestra & Antoni Wit
programme.desc: Antoni Wit conducts the Warsaw Philharmonic Orchestra in performances of Chopin's Piano Concertos No. 1, Op. 11 and No. 2, Op. 21. Soloists are Nikolai Demidenko and Evgeny Kissin. After performing the first concerto, Demidenko encores with Chopin's Mazurka Op. 17/4. Kissin closes the concert with Chopin's Etude Op. 10/12 and the Waltz in E minor, Op. post. This concert was part of the celebration of Chopin's 200th anniversary in 2010. Chopin composed the second concerto one year before the Concerto No. 1 and completed both works at the age of 20, before leaving his home country Poland and moving to Paris.

programme.title: Martha Argerich, Herbert Blomstedt & Lucerne Festival Orchestra
programme.sub-title: Beethoven - Piano Concerto No. 1 & Symphony No. 2
programme.desc: At the age of seven, Argentine pianist Martha Argerich made her debut with Ludwig van Beethoven's Piano Concerto No. 1 in C major, Op. 15, a piece that would accompany her throughout her career. The celebrated pianist performs this signature piece at the Lucerne Festival with the Lucerne Festival Orchestra under the baton of Swedish conductor Herbert Blomstedt, who makes his festival debut with the orchestra. Beethoven's Symphony No. 2 in D major, Op. 36, is also on the program. This performance was recorded at the Lucerne Culture and Congress Center (KKL), Switzerland, in August 2020.

programme.title: Ivan Fischer, Budapest Festival Orchestra & Richard Goode
programme.sub-title: Beethoven - Symphonies and Piano Concerto No. 4
programme.desc: Iván Fischer leads his Budapest Festival Orchestra (BFO) in a concert program dedicated to the music of Ludwig van Beethoven. The program opens with the composer's Symphony No. 1 in C major, Op. 21. Afterward, Fischer conducts Beethoven's Piano Concerto No. 4 in G major, Op. 58, in which Richard Goode features as the soloist. The acclaimed American pianist (1943) is known for his interpretations of the Beethoven repertoire. Goode recorded all five Beethoven piano concertos with the BFO and Fischer, earning him exceptional critical acclaim and a Grammy Award nomination. As an encore, Goode performs the Sarabande from J. S. Bach's Partita in B-flat major, BWV 825. The program closes with Beethoven's famous Symphony No. 5 in C minor, Op. 67. This performance was recorded at the Béla Bartók National Concert Hall in Budapest, Hungary, on January 29, 2017.

programme.title: Les Dissonances
programme.desc: Cinematic classical clips and energizing concert pieces featuring up-and-coming artists.

programme.title: Quatuor Ebène
programme.desc: Renowned French string quartet Quatuor Ébène marked the 250th birth anniversary of Ludwig van Beethoven (1770-1827) with a remarkable project: recording all of the great composer's sixteen string quartets. For five years, violinists Pierre Colombet and Gabriel Le Magadure, violist Marie Chilemme, and cellist Raphaël Merlin immersed themselves in Beethoven's 650 pages of sheet music. Their efforts culminated in the performance of the composer's complete repertoire for string quartet, which covers three decades of Beethoven's musical creativity, during six impressive concerts at Philharmonie de Paris in the autumn of 2020. Quatuor Ébène explored every facet of Beethoven's string quartet repertoire: from the youthful Opus 18 string quartets to the Razumovsky, Harp, and Serioso quartets (Opus 59, 74, and 95) from his middle period, and finally, the depth of his late quartets (Opus 127 to 135). This program features Quatuor Ébène performing Beethoven's String Quartet No. 1 in F major, Op. 18, No. 1 String Quartet No. 10 in E-flat major, Op. 74, "Harp" and String Quartet No. 9 in C major, Op. 59, No. 3, "Razumovsky". This concert performance was recorded at Philharmonie de Paris on October 13, 2020.

programme.title: Psychedelic Rock
programme.desc: The sound of psychedelic rock involved electronic instruments, guitar effects, oriental instruments, unconventional song structures, lyrics that referenced drugs or fantasy books, with extended instrumental sections. The genre bridged the transition from early blues and folk-based rock to progressive rock and hard rock. This episode features The Moody Blues, Emerson Lake & Palmer and Traffic

programme.title: Jazz Rock
programme.desc: Jazz rock generally grew out of the artistically ambitious rock subgenres of the late 1960s and early 1970s psychedelia, progressive rock, and the singer-songwriter movement. Jazz rock includes extensive improvisation and features soloists with distinctive sounds. This programme explores the music of artists Steely Dan, Doobie Brothers, Boz Scaggs.

programme.title: Un Ramo Para La Boda

programme.title: Realmente para siempre
programme.desc: Danny le propone matrimonio a Sara y le revela que es el príncipe de St. Ives. Necesitan la bendición de sus padres pero ellos lo desaprueban. Sara deberá luchar por permanecer fiel a sí misma, mientras se adapta a este nuevo estilo de vida.

programme.title: La isla misteriosa
programme.desc: Cuando una visita a un complejo turístico de temática misteriosa sale mal, un detective local y una psiquiatra criminal británica de vacaciones se unen para resolver un asesinato real. Protagonizada por Elizabeth Henstridge y Charlie Weber.

programme.title: Una Navidad eterna
programme.desc: Lucy regresa a casa para pasar la Navidad y conocer los términos del inusual testamento de su hermana.

programme.title: Socios en Navidad
programme.desc: La ejecutiva publicitaria, Elle, tiene la oportunidad de un ascenso trabajando en una campaña navideña justo cuando empieza a organizar un reencuentro navideño especial para sus amigos. Protagonizada por Brooke Nevin, Michael Cassidy.

programme.title: The Son
programme.desc: En 1852, el joven Eli es forzado a esconder un secreto mortal. En 1916, el regreso de María trae consecuencias devastadoras para el negocio petrolero de los McCullough.

programme.title: The Son
programme.desc: En 1852, el joven Eli debe proteger a Ingrid. En 1916, un nuevo ataque de Standard Oil obliga a la familia McCullough a reunirse.

programme.title: The Son
programme.desc: Los comanches van a la guerra en 1852. En 1916, la lucha de los McCullough con Standard Oil llega a un punto crítico.

programme.title: The Son
programme.desc: En 1852, la banda de los comanches del joven Eli se ve obligada a sobrevivir por su cuenta. En 1916, los McCullough buscan a Maria. Jeannie descubre un secreto devastador.

programme.title: The Son
programme.desc: En 1852, la tribu del joven Eli se encuentra con soldados que les hacen una oferta inesperada. En 1916, Pete toma una decisión que podría destrozar a la familia.

programme.title: The Son
programme.desc: En 1852, el joven Eli se ve obligado a tomar una decisión importante. En 1916, Eli libra una guerra con Standard Oil, provocando un enfrentamiento con Pete.

programme.title: Dark Winds
programme.desc: El policía tribal navajo Joe Leaphorn debe resolver crímenes junto a su nuevo ayudante Jim Chee, que vuelve a la reserva por primera vez desde que era niño. Ellos se enfrentarán a fuerzas malignas, terrenales y sobrenaturales.

programme.title: Dark Winds
programme.desc: Leaphorn y Chee entrevistan al testigo superviviente de los asesinatos del motel Big Rock. Chee se reúne con el forense. La causa de la muerte sigue siendo un misterio. Manuelito realiza un descubrimiento escalofriante.

programme.title: Mountain Men

programme.title: Mountain Men
programme.desc: Marty pone fin a una temporada fallida con una exitosa captura Tom se mantiene firme frente a una poderosa bestia y, en el último episodio de Preston, él y Eustace combaten fuego con fuego.

programme.title: Escape a lo salvaje
programme.desc: Tom Oar, Marty Meierotto y Eustace Conway revelan lo que se necesita para responder a la llamada de lo salvaje las historias jamás contadas de su primer invierno y las primeras pruebas que los forjaron como leyendas de las montañas.

programme.title: Mountain Men
programme.desc: Un deshielo prematuro hace que el suministro de Morgan caiga en picado Marty caza las bestias de la isla Kodiak y Tom aprovecha al máximo su racha de victorias sin precedentes.

programme.title: Mountain Men
programme.desc: Morgan se resbala navegando por el deshielo que está transformando la naturaleza salvaje de Alaska la caza de altura de Marty lo lleva a la cima de los picos más traicioneros de la isla Kodiak.

programme.title: Mountain Men
programme.desc: Un deshielo prematuro desata a los osos locales semanas antes de lo previsto en la gran cordillera de Alaska la búsqueda de un hogar por parte de Jason finalmente llega a su fin, y la carrera hacia la meta de Eustace y Preston acaba en ruinas.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Lucía tiene leucemia. Alejandro está preocupado por la salud de su hija y Patricia lo consuela. Irene llega y los sorprende abrazados. Verónica adopta a Cecilia. Lucas persigue a Gertrudis.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Guerra siente que Verónica está interesada en su hijo. La desaparición de Gertrudis pone a los lobos nerviosos. La psiquiatra va a la casa de Dantés. Ramón siente culpa por la muerte del Tigre.

programme.title: Al otro lado del muro
programme.sub-title: Sofía oculta su boda a Joel
programme.desc: Ernesto hace oficial la boda con Alejandra y Joel no puede creer lo que escucha, después de haber pasado toda la noche con ella, sin haberselo contado. La familia de Eliza conoce su decisión.

programme.title: Al otro lado del muro
programme.desc: Mientras Ernesto esta bajo los efectos del narcótico, Sofía le roba los datos del negocio de la trata, guardados en el dispositivo que lleva colgado en el cuello. Alondra y Sofía se reconocen.

programme.title: Dueños del paraíso
programme.desc: Elizondo, uno de los sicarios de Quezada que violó a Anastasia, se lleva el cuerpo de Cardona y a un grupo de prostitutas para celebrar, la agente Corona se infiltra. Anastasia es secuestrada.

programme.title: Dueños del paraíso
programme.desc: Anastasia se burla de Elizondo por mentiroso, cuando él confiesa haber matado a Nataniel. Verónica le dice a Adán y a Conrado que está muy preocupada por los negocios que tienen con Anastasia.

programme.title: Dueños del paraíso
programme.desc: Anastasia adquiere un nuevo centro de operaciones, ella enfrenta a los hijos de Nataniel, Silvana y Elías, quienes quieren su herencia. Conrado confirma la calidad de la mercancía.

programme.title: Señora Acero: Quintanilla abandona el cártel
programme.desc: Traición con traición se paga y Quintanilla entiende que la vida le pasó factura. Sara llega a su límite con la Tuti, quien puede no ser la única embarazada de la casa.

programme.title: Corazón valiente
programme.desc: Estela confirma sus sospechas sobre Ángela y Samantha. Juan Marcos le cuenta a Willy que Ángela y Samantha son amigas desde niñas. En un encuentro ellas dos conversan, y Ángela le confiesa a Samantha, que hará todo lo posible por vivir su amor.

programme.title: Corazón valiente
programme.desc: Fernanda logra su cometido y separa a Juan Marcos de Ángela. Samantha acepta ser la directora general de las empresas de Darío Sandoval. Sam visita a Ángela en el hospital.

programme.title: Corazón valiente
programme.desc: Fernanda confirma que Ángela fue contratada como guardaespaldas. Luis asegura que cambió y que puede ser un mejor marido. Juan Marcos confiesa que extraña a Génesis.

programme.title: Corazón valiente
programme.desc: Fernanda prepara una poción letal para Violeta. Samantha y Ángela logran rescatar a Willy de las llamas y él se entera de que Sam es su guardaespaldas. Samantha sufre, no podrá ser madre.

programme.title: Corazón valiente
programme.desc: Ángela decide seguir con su marido por su hija. Luis la presiona y confiesa que sería capaz de matar por su mujer y su hija. Samantha y Willy logran llegar a la corte.

programme.title: Corazón valiente
programme.desc: El inspector Marshall le informa a Fernanda que surgieron novedades sobre la investigación. Ángela sale corriendo de la empresa luego de ver a Sol besándose con Juan Marcos. Ángela, a solas con Luis, le pide que deje de fingir.

programme.title: Corazón valiente
programme.desc: Interrogan a Ángela sobre la muerte de Isabel Uriarte. La guardaespaldas le confiesa a la persona equivocada que está enamorada de Juan Marcos. Fernanda ordena la muerte de Génesis.

programme.title: Corazón valiente
programme.desc: Génesis es el blanco del odio de Fernanda. Luis le informa a Fernanda que no consiguió la gente que ella le había pedido para llevar a cabo el plan de matar a Génesis dentro de la clínica.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Miguel devuelve la grabadora perdida a Martín para entregársela a Gastón. Alma pasa año nuevo con Franco, Karla interrumpe su cena. Todos disfrutan de la fiesta de fin de año en el yate de Valle de Bravo, Nico celebra con su papá en la iglesia.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Miguel se escapa del colegio para acompañar a Sabrina a sus análisis, Teo le pide a su papá que los ayude para poder escaparse. Mia se entera de que Miguel está con la mamá de Teo y va a buscarlo al hospital. Roberta intenta detener a Mia.

programme.title: Rebelde

programme.title: Rebelde

programme.title: Rebelde

programme.title: Fearless In The Kitchen
programme.desc: Amy always thought that by twenty-five she would have learned to cook. Well, that birthday has come and gone and Amy can barely boil pasta -- let alone prepare a meal. Of course that doesn't mean that she hasn't tried. Her past attempts (and subsequent failures) include flaming grilled cheese and soggy kale pasta with boiled vegetables smothered in kitchen floor dust sauce (Amy tried to wash vegetables after she started cooking them, burnt her fingers and then ended up dropping them on the linoleum). The fact that she never learned is not completely Amy's fault. She grew up in a household where the cardinal rule of meal preparation was “we'll eat whatever will defrost the fastest”. Growing up it was typical for a family meal to consist of hot dogs and an individually wrapped bag of chips. These days, Amy wants to grow up and learn to make healthy well-balanced meals for herself, her partner, Cheryl, and their friends. This is at the forefront of Amy's mind these days because she works part time at a naturopathic clinic where her boss recently asked her why she didn't cook for herself, “after all wasn't she worth it?” And if that wasn't enough to send Amy screaming towards the nearest frying pan then how about the fact that she just got a new job is the assistant to the Dean of George Brown's Culinary Arts Program? Amy needs to learn to cook as soon as possible in order to quell her daily terror of being ‘outed' by the culinary fraud squad.

programme.title: Fearless In The Kitchen
programme.desc: Peter and his son, Dave are a very lucky couple of guys. For years, their respective wife and mother, Vicki, has kept them well fed with an onslaught of gourmet meals. This is just as well because each of the guys is a disaster in the kitchen. Peter claims that he once transformed barbequed sausages into “burnt offerings” and, another time, burnt stewed rhubarb in a non-stick pot so badly that the company that made the cookware refused to honour its' lifetime guarantee. These days, Peter's only signature dish is what he terms, “linguine a la fromage” a.k.a. instant mac'n'cheese. Not to be outdone by his dad, Dave considers his burnt chicken in honey sauce to be his ‘specialty'. And, when left to his own devices, Dave generally subsists on three simple meals cottage cheese & pineapple, apples & peanut butter sandwiches and boiled broccoli. Although the pair consider themselves to be adventurous in many ways (they both enjoy travel, skiing and skydiving), they feel they are finally ready for the ultimate adventure – to learn how to cook something truly impressive for Vicki.

programme.title: Fearless In The Kitchen
programme.desc: Twins, Natalie and Nadine (24) do everything together they share the same degree, the same friends, the same job… and the same avoidance of the kitchen. It's a good thing that they have both their mother and their neighbour, Rathika, to rely on. The two consistently keeps the twins' fridge packed with home-cooked meals ready to heat and eat. When Natalie and Nadine are not busy popping these pre-packaged dishes into the microwave then they are quite content to fill up the rest of their daily menu with fast-food, take-out and micro-waved hot dogs. It isn't even beyond them to eat potato chips for breakfast (that is, when they haven't run out of sugar cereal… sans milk of course after all “it makes it soggy”). However, the girls realize that now that they are living on their own it is high time for them to make the shift from adolescent culinary habits to more adult cuisine. The problem is they haven't got a clue where to begin, although one thing is for sure, if they are going to cook they want it to be fun. Christine will have to work twice as hard as she attempts to help these gals move through their culinary growing pains and get them to keep the fun -- but lose the junk.

programme.title: Fearless In The Kitchen
programme.desc: I.T. Professional and father of two, Darren is extremely active and adventurous. After all he plays volleyball, canoes, bike, snowmobiles, does adventure races and even proposed to Sue, his wife of ten years atop Mt. Kilimanjaro. Although fearless in many areas of his life, he considers himself to be reckless and easily distracted in the kitchen. This may explain his continued history of culinary calamities. From setting his entire barbeque ablaze with unattended chicken on a spit to annihilating a $200 piece of beef tenderloin in a misguided attempt at his mother's famous Beef Wellington (something he has always wanted to make), Darren is a mess in the kitchen – literally… as he drives his wife to distraction with his continual need to dirty every pot in the house. If that wasn't enough, then Darren's struggle to make gravy, which always turns out as a “mud puddle” and his persistent belief that when it comes to garlic, “more is never enough” is prime fodder for a culinary intervention. Christine will have her work cut out for her as she applies the brakes to Darren's ‘full throttle' culinary approach if she ever hopes to help him live up to his life motto of being “In it – to win it!”

programme.title: Ciao Italia
programme.desc: Mary Ann's cooking student Erica creates a mouth-watering Cherry Focaccia from start to finish. From making a sweet dough from scratch to topping it with slow-cooked Bing Cherries, it's the perfect indulgence for a special day—or any day. Next up, Mary Ann shifts gears from sweet to savory with a Focaccia Barese, topped with fresh cherry tomatoes and Castelvetrano olives. Focaccia? Gotcha!

programme.title: Ciao Italia
programme.desc: Mary Ann reveals the secret to Crepes in Chicken Broth: make the savory broth from scratch with fresh ingredients and elevates the very versatile crepe to new heights. Then...never heard of Tomato Marmelade? Mary Ann show her students how tomatoes, grated ginger, a clove-dotted onion, sugar, and—surprise!—balsamic vinegar—make a terrific topping for fresh ricotta, bruschetta, or cheese.

programme.title: Ciao Italia
programme.desc: Mary Ann teaches her Scuola Culinaria students how to make a beyond-moist-and-tender Apricot Yogurt Pound Cake. Next up, she prepares a classic Italian Pound Cake with a sweet/tart taste of lemon zest and lemon juice. In for a penny, in for a pound with two great dessert cakes fit for any occasion, including fit for a king.

programme.title: Ciao Italia
programme.desc: Mary Ann teams up with Executive Chef David Crinieri to wow her cooking students by exploring the world of perfect pestos. Chef David leads off with a delicate Watercress Pesto tossed with Fresh Spinach Linguine and topped with an Artichoke Crudo. Mary Ann's up next with her signature Broccolini and Artichoke Pesto tossed with Fusilli. Want perfect pesto every time? Try either one—or both!

programme.title: Ciao Italia
programme.desc: Mary Ann and eager Scuola Culinaria student John roll up their sleeves and dive into the essential steps need to create an all-time favorite of favorites, Pizza Margherita. Step by step, sauce by sauce, cheese by cheese learn how to take your pizza all the way from yeast to “Yay!” And they're not done yet, not until they make Fried Dough with Cinnamon and Sugar from yeast to “Yum!”

programme.title: Ciao Italia
programme.desc: Mary Ann re-creates a rustic cake from the Abruzzo region of Italy. She first makes the pastry dough, chills it, rolls it out, and drapes it into a tube pan. Then she combines sugared ricotta cheese, lemon zest and vanilla extract with beaten egg whites to create a pillowy cloud that goes inside. The Abruzzese Ricotta Cake is a traditional Easter time specialty, but a joy to enjoy all year long.

programme.title: Ciao Italia
programme.desc: Mary Ann prepares a southern Italian favorite: Oven Roasted Lamb Shanks. After searing the meat to seal in the juices, she adds a hearty red wine and beef broth sauce, along with carrots and onions for a long, low, slow cook. While that's in the oven she prepares a perfect side of Roasted Fennel and Beans. No time to cook? Make time for this slow-cooked favorite!

programme.title: Ciao Italia
programme.desc: “Acqua Pazza” is Italian for “Crazy Water” a Neapolitan seafood favorite. Mary shows her students how to simmer fresh codfish over a tomato-based bed of sliced fennel, Castelvetrano olives, capers, garlic, and hot red pepper flakes. While that's cooking away in a covered skillet, Mary Ann and student Mary Ellen prepare shrimp-filled Seafood with Fregola. Enough to go crazy for, right?

programme.title: Ciao Italia
programme.desc: In a matter of minutes, Mary Ann combines sliced chicken breasts with onions, garlic, and turmeric and into the oven it goes to create her husband's recipe Guy's Chicken with Olives and Turmeric. Then she makes another favorite, Meatballs Milan Style. Stuffed with filled with mortadella, beef, and ham and fried to a crunchy crisp, you'll want seconds, thirds, fourths!

programme.title: Treyvaud's Kitchen

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.sub-title: Traverse The Dam, Bee Headed, Water Coffin
programme.desc: Are you worth a Dam? Suspended high over a dam is a 350-foot long tightrope with flags attached. Contestants would have to cross the tightrope and collect flags while holding on to a higher tightrope for support. The two men and the two women to collect the most flags in 5 minutes would advance to the next round. Stunt 2 is a real Bee. The ones left are covered with over 200,000 honeybees. Once covered, they would have stand for 2 minutes covered in bees. All contestants who completed this stunt would advance to the finals. For the finale, contestants are locked inside a Plexiglas box full of holes and submerged underwater. Once a red light came on, they would have to figure out which of 2 keys unlocked the coffin and swim to the surface. The contestant to complete this stunt the fastest would be the Fear Factor Champion.

programme.title: Hooligans and Explosions
programme.desc: Will a frying pan-wielding housewife stop Lou and Sonia from getting their car? Plus, a repo involving a truck filled with black market contraband goes horrifyingly wrong for Matt and Froy.

programme.title: We Weren't Informed
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy end up on one of the weirdest repo's they've ever encountered when a white cargo van unleashes a wave of workers. Then, Lou, Sonia, and Rob go green when they find they learn the Mercedes Benz they are after has been converted to run on biodiesel. And finally, Matt and Froy can't seem to get a word in edgewise when they encounter a shrieking girl and her biker boyfriend who claim their Mercedes was paid in full. Little do our guys know that she was right all along.

programme.title: That's Disrespectful
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Lyndah are faced with a choice. Do they attempt to reclaim a burnt-out husk of a car from its high-flying owners, or do they just give up and go home?

programme.title: The Final Finale
programme.desc: On this special one hour series finale of Operation Repo, the team are scrambling to get ready for the huge Yacht repo to secure the sale of the company and the distribution of their severance packages, while still going after every day repos. In this episode, Sonia and Froy find a payment procrastinating pervert in the park, Matt and Ronnie put the brakes on a rich racecar driver, Matt and Carlos get stuck in the middle of sign maker's gluing process, and Ronnie and Carlos try to reason with an irresponsible retro racist. And finally, on their most dangerous repo ...

programme.title: Four Wheel Surprise
programme.desc: First, Lou and Matt confront a big-time player and his bodyguards at a Brazilian restaurant. Then, Sonia and Lyndah head to a yard sale to get a vehicle away from the car's owner and her out-of-control friend. And finally, the whole team hits the beach in an effort to get a truck-load of ATV's away from a gang of knife-wielding beach bums.

programme.title: El Prisionero
programme.desc: Lou and his cousin Rob face trouble on the job when a debtor makes shocking claims to police about the newest member of the Pizarro clan. Plus, will a repossession from a well-connected socialite end with Matt and Froy riding into the sunset, or is somebody going to end up locked in a Mexican prison?

programme.title: M.I.A. & D.E.A
programme.desc: When Matt and Froy go missing, Sonia is on a mission to figure out what they've got up their sleeves.

programme.title: Should Have Seen This Coming
programme.desc: First, Lou, Sonia, and Froy unfurl an elaborate sting when they repo a taxicab by tricking its driver into picking them up. But what to do with his ferociously inebriated client?

programme.title: What the Truck?!?
programme.desc: The repo team is back! On the premiere episode of the summer season of Operation Repo, Lou, Matt, Sonia, Froy, and Lyndah are back together and better than ever...although a secret meeting suggests trouble in paradise. This week, the team confronts a shady import/export warehouse filled with unpaid-for cars, a pair of reckless rodeo gals, and a cunning team of car thieves who don't even think twice before running off with the team's truck.

programme.title: Yoga-to Be Kidding Me
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy head into a nice part of town to repossess a BMW from an entitled yuppie, but first they'll have to contend with his rampaging long-distance girlfriend. Then, Lou, Lyndah, and Matt venture into a trailer park where they find a debtor who's as angry as he is drunk. And finally, Sonia and Lyndah travel under the cover of night to repossess a vehicle from a young woman and her irate yoga instructor.

programme.title: Viva Las Vegas!
programme.desc: An Elvis impersonator gets Matt and Ronnie all shook up, and a ventriloquist's dummy has a nasty attitude that gets on Sonia's bad side. When Froy goes missing, Lou has to pick up the slack in a repo that goes terribly wrong, but when Carlos reveals Froy's true whereabouts tempers ..

programme.title: Matt Vs. Giant Chicken
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy cope with the uncertainty of Lou's condition by liberating a Vespa from a leather-clad biker and his rabble-rousing girlfriend. Then, Matt and Froy head out again to claim a Toyota Yaris from a truant children's entertainer wearing an unexpected outfit. And finally, the whole team heads out to repo more than six cars from an insolvent dealership, with the fate of their leader still in question.

programme.title: Reclaim the Plane
programme.desc: In the premiere of the final season of Operation Repo, the team must recover an airplane and return one-hundred thousand dollars. But after two members of the team bail when it's time to save the company, will the others be able to bounce back in time to avoid a jail sentence?

programme.title: Steve
programme.desc: For five seasons, Steve Harvey hosted a daytime talk show that was based in Chicago. In 2017, looking to focus more on celebrity guests, the show got a face-lift -- including shortening the title to simply "Steve" -- along with a move to Los Angeles, where there is no shortage of famous people for Harvey to welcome to his stage as guests. In addition to conducting interviews, Harvey brings his fresh -- and often funny -- perspective to the day's hot topics and Hollywood happenings. The show also features games and comedy and lifestyle segments. Whether he's chatting with a star or sharing his opinions on the news, Harvey does it as only he can.

programme.title: Eco-Heroines
programme.desc: Lorane is a young scientist dedicated to building shelters in the Franco-Swiss mountains for orphaned baby lynx, one of Europe's last great feline species and predators. Lynx are critical to the preservation and growth of Europe's habitats, playing a key role in the wider eco-system. Lorane's passion and commitment to save every last lynx teaches valuable lessons about how animals and humans can learn to live side by side.

programme.title: Eco-Heroines
programme.desc: The decline of the pangolin is staggering. Virtually exterminated from all over Asia, it still survives in Africa. But the Asian market demands ever increasing quantities, the value of its scales reaching disproportionate prices. A new symbol of human greed, the animal will not last long. Despite this dire fate, Tessa wants to believe in another future for the pangolin. She joined forces with the Aka pygmies in the great forest of the Congo Basin to come to the aid of this endearing animal, the last vestige of prehistoric times.

programme.title: Eco-Heroines
programme.desc: In Madagascar, Mahefa travels through isolated forests to meet the Betsileos, the local populations who participate in her lemur study and preservation program. Threatened by deforestation which is ravaging the entire island, the iconic Malagasy animal suffers from this scourge which also contributes to the worsening of the poverty of the inhabitants. Through real expeditions to the hearts of the forests, Mahefa makes young and old aware of the protection of their environment.

programme.title: Diamond Beach I: Indonesia
programme.desc: Upgrade your staycation by immersing yourself in the beauty of turquoise waters and a majestic rocky coastline.

programme.title: Rainbow Reef Relaxation 1
programme.desc: Sit back, relax and enjoy the dazzling world of coral reefs in 4K you embark on a journey through some of the most vibrant underwater reefs on our blue planet - including many scenes which no longer look like this due to coral bleaching. From the cinematographer: "The footage for this film was shot over a period of some years in French Polynesia, Micronesia, Indonesia and East Timor. Unfortunately there are not that vibrant anymore today. Coral reefs have suffered from the rise of water temperature, rise in acidity, destructive fishing methods and severe storms caused by climate change." - Peter Schneider. "Rainbow Reef Relaxation" is a 3-hour long, sweeping yet majestic & vibrant underwater journey to the world's most beautiful lagoons, as captured by Nature Relaxation collaborator Peter Schneider (Underwatercam) paired with ambient underwater sounds and brand new ambient music by the Cynic Project. Filmed in High Definition several years ago, thanks to its age this film offers magical glimpses of an underwater world that is bursting with life, color, and beauty.

programme.title: A Day in Paradise
programme.desc: A graciously flowing four hour long pure nature relaxation experience, "A Day In Paradise" immerses viewers in the sights and sounds of one of the world's most pure and picturesque tropical islands - for an entire day from sunrise, to sunset. Filmed in 2013 by David Huting, the tiny island is hidden off of the northeastern coast of the outer Fiji Islands (near Taveuni), and boasts a perfect white sandy beach, groves of palm trees, and a majestic lagoon that shelters the island from all sides. It has more turtle visitors than humans!

programme.title: Atuh Beach: Indonesia
programme.desc: Take a tour of beautiful Indonesian waters, surrounded by impressive rock formations.

programme.title: Bulog Dos Island
programme.desc: Feel the natural beauty of a small tropical island surrounded by turquoise waters.

programme.title: Cliffside Beach: Indonesia
programme.desc: Experience the thrilling view of a cliff-top lookout of one of Indonesia's most breathtaking spots.

programme.title: Good Morning

programme.title: Morning Inspiration

Each piece, crafted with a monochromatic palette, reveals the exquisite interplay of light and shadow. From captivating landscapes to evocative portraits, these black and white images evoke a sense of refined elegance, transporting viewers to a realm of tasteful minimalism.

programme.title: Shades Of Color

programme.title: Shades of Color

programme.title: Shades of Color
programme.desc: Shades of Color: Shades Of Gold E13 — A luminous art collection celebrating fortune, warmth, and the rich glow of possibility. Spanning diverse mediums, each piece shimmers with golden hues, while the soundtrack infuses the experience with lively, mystical charm.

programme.title: Shades Of Color
programme.desc: Shades Of Color S1E13: Shades Of Gold — Experience the opulent allure of an art collection adorned with the lustrous elegance of gold. These works illuminate creativity, from shimmering landscapes to gilded abstractions, embodying the richness of this resplendent hue.

programme.title: Spring Forward
